reviews.review_title: Good game we need more ppl to download
reviews.review_description: If you like archery and fast-paced moving games then you need to come download hibow it's a five-star game in my books and it takes a lot for me to actually want to do a review for a game but this game needs more people to download it so it can be even better than what it already is we need a bigger community to come out and actually download this because they hold tournaments they have deathmatches and all different kinds of arrows you can shoot yourself across the map all the while shooting arrows that people down below you and I mean like it's it's not just ground level archery you are up in the air most of the time flying across the map shooting at people it's very fast paced must download

This really is an awesome game for a freebie. It's easily a buyable game. The graphics, controls, and game play are great. Easy to get into and understand. Need more people to download and get in on the competition. The bots are intuitive but some human interaction would make playing so much more competitive than it already is. Would have to say for a free game it is one of my top choices. Great job with development guys can't wait to see what it grows into.
Really wish more people played this games. It’s one of the cooler ones I’ve found on VR. I’ve only ever played with like one other people . But the mechanics and controls are really fun .

Hibow is a really fun and exciting game. It's takes the cake w the soaring threw the air and competetiveness and all the awesome bows it has to offer it really is a remarkable game that I get lost in for hours you.

Wish i found this game sooner as majority of the time i log on to play its quite dead. The trajectory movement is what sets this game apart from the rest and feels incredibly smooth while also creating a high skill ceiling for advanced players. Highly recommend 👍

developer_response.body:
Hi hotwiregaming1!
Sorry for the bad experience. We’ve fixed an issue on our end. Please restart the game and try again. If you’re still stuck, please send your player ID and a screenshot to contact@chesstar.com.
Hibow Dev Team

developer_response.body:
Hi Mr_Boombastic5683!
Thanks for the honest feedback. We’re actively working on bringing more players into the game through targeted promotions and server expansions. In the meantime, feel free to use our in-game invite feature to loop your friends in and send them an invite to our Discord community. The more the merrier—see you online!
Hibow Dev Team

reviews.review_description: Graphics style feels like overwatch but using bows and arrows. The ability to change the kind of arrows you use makes you feel like Hawkeye from marvel. Love this game and quite addictive
It’s a blast. Easy to learn and fun to play. I wish there was a bigger player base though
Very cool

I originally grabbed this game for the kids to play but after I tried it, I couldn’t stop playing it. I really enjoy the different bows and the chicken arrows. Have to say favorite bow would be the sniper bow. Chicken arrows are fun especially if you can playing against your kids and you see them all as chickens. Lmao
Cant wait for more updates
I’m a big overwatch player and being on vr, makes it seem like it’s overwatch but vr, I’m liking where this is
Loving this game so far keep up the good work
Fun. Definitely one of the best games I've tried in vr

This game is one of the most compelling VR experiences I’ve played. The bow mechanics are fantastic, and the ability to change arrow and bow types, add novel weapons, fly using your bow, it’s all captivating.

But I must have missed something. The multi player arenas are largely deserted, the bot-driven public arena is too easy / random once you have an hour or two under your belt, and the constant  “buy this” prompts means I can’t let my kids alone with the game.

Great game, needs more people to play it!
While it is fun. You may need to get use to the action of movement. Tends to get dizzy due to body and eye coordination not in tally. Comfort; intense
movement is amazing, super creative
Love the different load outs you can do

reviews.review_title: Way more fun than I thought!
reviews.review_description: I'm typically all about FPS games on consoles and didn't have much of a hope for a bow and arrow only game. I am today new on VR (Quest 3), and that being said, playing this in VR is a phenomenal experience. The control mechanics are great.  I did wander around the lobby area wondering what to do and how to get started for a while, so it would, be nice if there was a flashing tutorial button that came up right away. I basically wandered around and figured out the controls playing with the bow that I had in the lobby area before I ever even found the tutorials or the menu button. This is probably just because this is literally the second game I'm ever playing on VR, so I didn't really know to use the menu button.  I'm blaming myself for that, not the game, plus, this is early access currently, so I'm guessing a lot of things will be improved over time.

reviews.review_title: One of the best competitive games
reviews.review_description: Its in early access but still is an amazing game
Easily spend hours on the game
The physics are sweet.  Great game. Easy from the jump
This is the best game I played

reviews.review_title: Wow loads of fun, nice graphics!
reviews.review_description: Probably the most fun game I’ve played so far! Love the effects, graphics and gameplay. Great change from gun related games!
Wow, I just love this game it's so much fun and I get a decent workout playing it. No question one of the best vr games I've ever played !
Side note to the Developers: I think it would be pretty awesome if you instituted team wars for the death matches! Though it might actually already exist and I just haven't unlocked it yet.
It’s a great game and I love the mechanics of it
Not perfect or bad
Got to try this out! Fun game for archery and battle royals.
Great game but sometimes the game crashes while searching for a room or game to join

reviews.review_title: Very fun & high speed archery PvP!
reviews.review_description:
I have played for about an hour most days the last 2 months or so, and really appreciate how easily the motions to switch arrows/weapons or heal become muscle memory.  The jumping aspect of the game is great fun, and a novel way to play that fits perfectly with VR.

The bots provide a good level challenge without being OP.

There are sadly still occasional glitches that interfere with play.  Notably, the bot logic in the Battle Royal mode can result in waiting around alone in the above ground portion of the safe zone unable to see or attack the bot(s) that ended up underground (or glitched below the map?).  Eventually the bots jump into the radiation enough times and , but it’s just… boring.
A decent death match style game with bows and swords. Needs more players so come on people this is awesome fun for free 2 play. Come put an arrow in my face 🏹🎯🤣
The game is awesome
I love it when bow are invole not guns. I will love to see alot more games modes and teams modes as well.
Great experience

Very easy to get the hang of you’ll be flying around shooting and slashing people in no time, this is one of the most fun games I have ever played on the quest and if your thinking of getting it. Get it it’s worth it.

developer_response.body: I'm sorry, you seem to have encountered some issues or difficulties in the game. If you wish, you can share your feedback by sending an email to contact@chesstar.com or by joining our community. We will provide regular updates on the progress of issue resolution. You're welcome to join our community at: discord.hibow.fun.
